remove.note: Removed list sections from ListsTab in ds-preview. Component still in packages/ui for any prototype that might use it.
Removed from ds-preview, index.ts exports, and App.tsx import. Component file kept in packages/ui but no longer exported.

keep_as_is.note: User likes it even though it wasn't in Figma. Keep.

done.note: Rewritten: single-select = surface-2 container, white elevated selected card; multi-select = accent blue selected. No more black fill.

Completely rewritten: white card with colored border per variant (neutral/info/success/warning/danger). Notification added as alert-without-dismiss + up to 2 CTAs. Snackbar is now single-line bordered card, not dark toast.
All initials now use --foreground-primary (dark). Background palette expanded to 7 colors including purple, cyan.
Removed uppercase class from labeled divider.
Renamed colors to semantic names (success/warning/danger/info/history) with correct token values from Figma: danger=Red/50, info=Litmus/50, etc.
Rewritten: wide pill-shaped bars (8×20px), mic icon on left, level shown by filled-count from left, gray unfilled bars. Removed waveform height variation.
Added: danger, danger-secondary, primary-inverse, secondary-inverse, tertiary-inverse variants for Button. Added: danger, inverse variants for IconButton.
Skip and play/pause buttons now use DS IconButton (tertiary-neutral for skip, accent for play/pause).
Date cells changed from rounded-full (circle) to rounded-[4px] (rounded rect). Nav chevrons use DS IconButton.
Title now centered with absolute-positioned left/right slots. Back button shows '< Back' text, not bare arrow. Added flexible leading slot.
Removed footer divider. Buttons now stacked full-width vertically via actions prop. Added illustration slot at top. Compact centered card layout.

Rewritten: label above, S/M/L sizes (28/36/44px), all states (default/hover/focused/success/error/disabled). feedback is now object {type, message?}. Feedback icon + caption below. prefix/suffix slots.
Rewritten: label, rows (min height), auto-expand, feedback {type, message?}, maxLength with character counter inside border (bottom-right). Made interactive in demo with controlled state.

New component. sectionTitle header + mode-driven actions (view: edit+dictate icons; edit: edit+dictate+Copy btn; dictating/processing: mic/spinner + Dictate + Save + Cancel). Accent border in dictating/processing. Content editable only in edit mode.
Fixed children API (was using label prop, rendering nothing). Rewrote to use children, added underline, external icon support, disabled state, neutral intent. Demo updated with inline usage example.

Removed all-caps from header (was uppercase tracking-[0.8px]). Added density prop (M/S). Added TableFooter with record count + rows-per-page selector + prev/next pagination. Added BadgesCell and StatusCell helper components. Updated demo with richer Person+Avatar+Badges+Status columns and TableFooter.

ProgressBar rewritten as thin 3px segment stepper (steps/current props). Pagination replaced by PageIndicator (dot-based carousel indicator, filled=current). Old Pagination kept for backward compat. TableFooter handles large-count pagination. StepIndicator unchanged.
